summary:
The issue was an off-by-one error in processor.py when slicing the records list.

Fix applied in processor.py:

Before:
end = start + batch_size - 1  # grab exactly batch_size items
batch = records[start:end]

After:
end = start + batch_size  # slice end is exclusive, so this grabs exactly batch_size items
batch = records[start:end]

Running test.sh now reports:
PASS: All records processed correctly across batch boundaries
